text: **Anna:** Hello.

**Professor Bot:** Weaver used the {future|未来の|/ˈfjuːtʃər/|The future is exciting.} continuous verb tense to talk about the interview.
**Anna:** We use future continuous to talk about actions that will be
**Anna:** In progress at or around a time in the future.
**Anna:** For example, Ms.
**Anna:** Weaver says, Tomorrow you'll be interviewing musician Emma G.
**Anna:** There are two options for future continuous.
**Anna:** The first is will be
**Anna:** plus the ing form of the verb.
**Anna:** And the second is B plus going to be plus the ing form of the verb.
